text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
La laa la! ♪ I'm going out with Acute next
weekend! ♪ Can't wait to try some ogura bean
paste pancakes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let me see. The lucky direction and color for that
day... interesting. Northeast and lavender, huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've got the perfect lavender skirt to wear
for the outing!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That said... I haven't worn it in ages.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...I guess I should try it on now to make sure it fits.
Just in case, you know?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh... the waist is a bit... hmm... Ah?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should I do? I won't be able to wear my
lucky color now. Not to mention, ogura bean
paste pancakes are packed with calories...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to get back in shape! For the sake of my
happy, lucky outing with Acute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to keep her promise with Wonder
Acute, Copano Rickey works as hard as she can
and successfully gets her weight under control.
